name: Figma
tagline: Design files, components, variables, and design-to-code context
description: Official Figma MCP server for Design files, components, variables, and design-to-code context. Transport: Remote MCP / Streamable HTTP; desktop MCP server also available through Figma desktop app. Authentication: Figma account authorization; remote server available on all seats/plans; desktop server requires Dev or Full seat on paid plans.
